Basic footnote
.
This has a footnote[^1].

[^1]: Footnote content here
.
<p>This has a footnote<sup class="footnote-ref"><a href="#fn1" id="fnref1">[1]</a></sup>.</p>
<hr class="footnotes-sep">
<section class="footnotes">
<ol class="footnotes-list">
<li id="fn1" class="footnote-item"><p>Footnote content here <a href="#fnref1" class="footnote-backref">↩︎</a></p>
</li>
</ol>
</section>
.

Multiple footnotes
.
A[^1] and B[^2].

[^1]: First footnote

[^2]: Second footnote
.
<p>A<sup class="footnote-ref"><a href="#fn1" id="fnref1">[1]</a></sup> and B<sup class="footnote-ref"><a href="#fn2" id="fnref2">[2]</a></sup>.</p>
<hr class="footnotes-sep">
<section class="footnotes">
<ol class="footnotes-list">
<li id="fn1" class="footnote-item"><p>First footnote <a href="#fnref1" class="footnote-backref">↩︎</a></p>
</li>
<li id="fn2" class="footnote-item"><p>Second footnote <a href="#fnref2" class="footnote-backref">↩︎</a></p>
</li>
</ol>
</section>
.

Duplicate references
.
A[^1] and B[^1].

[^1]: Note
.
<p>A<sup class="footnote-ref"><a href="#fn1" id="fnref1">[1]</a></sup> and B<sup class="footnote-ref"><a href="#fn1" id="fnref1:1">[1:1]</a></sup>.</p>
<hr class="footnotes-sep">
<section class="footnotes">
<ol class="footnotes-list">
<li id="fn1" class="footnote-item"><p>Note <a href="#fnref1" class="footnote-backref">↩︎</a> <a href="#fnref1:1" class="footnote-backref">↩︎</a></p>
</li>
</ol>
</section>
.

Forward references
.
Forward ref[^2] then[^1].

[^1]: First

[^2]: Second
.
<p>Forward ref<sup class="footnote-ref"><a href="#fn1" id="fnref1">[1]</a></sup> then<sup class="footnote-ref"><a href="#fn2" id="fnref2">[2]</a></sup>.</p>
<hr class="footnotes-sep">
<section class="footnotes">
<ol class="footnotes-list">
<li id="fn1" class="footnote-item"><p>Second <a href="#fnref1" class="footnote-backref">↩︎</a></p>
</li>
<li id="fn2" class="footnote-item"><p>First <a href="#fnref2" class="footnote-backref">↩︎</a></p>
</li>
</ol>
</section>
.

Inline footnote
.
Inline^[This is inline] here.
.
<p>Inline<sup class="footnote-ref"><a href="#fn1" id="fnref1">[1]</a></sup> here.</p>
<hr class="footnotes-sep">
<section class="footnotes">
<ol class="footnotes-list">
<li id="fn1" class="footnote-item"><p>This is inline <a href="#fnref1" class="footnote-backref">↩︎</a></p>
</li>
</ol>
</section>
.

Mixed inline and regular footnotes
.
Inline^[This is inline] and ref[^1].

[^1]: Regular note
.
<p>Inline<sup class="footnote-ref"><a href="#fn1" id="fnref1">[1]</a></sup> and ref<sup class="footnote-ref"><a href="#fn2" id="fnref2">[2]</a></sup>.</p>
<hr class="footnotes-sep">
<section class="footnotes">
<ol class="footnotes-list">
<li id="fn1" class="footnote-item"><p>This is inline <a href="#fnref1" class="footnote-backref">↩︎</a></p>
</li>
<li id="fn2" class="footnote-item"><p>Regular note <a href="#fnref2" class="footnote-backref">↩︎</a></p>
</li>
</ol>
</section>
.

Multi-paragraph footnote
.
Text[^1].

[^1]: First paragraph.

    Second paragraph.
.
<p>Text<sup class="footnote-ref"><a href="#fn1" id="fnref1">[1]</a></sup>.</p>
<hr class="footnotes-sep">
<section class="footnotes">
<ol class="footnotes-list">
<li id="fn1" class="footnote-item"><p>First paragraph.</p>
<p>Second paragraph. <a href="#fnref1" class="footnote-backref">↩︎</a></p>
</li>
</ol>
</section>
.

Unreferenced footnote definition is not rendered
.
Text here.

[^1]: This should not appear
.
<p>Text here.</p>
.

No footnote without definition
.
This is not a footnote[^1].
.
<p>This is not a footnote[^1].</p>
.

Footnote with emphasis in content
.
Text[^1].

[^1]: This has **bold** and *italic*.
.
<p>Text<sup class="footnote-ref"><a href="#fn1" id="fnref1">[1]</a></sup>.</p>
<hr class="footnotes-sep">
<section class="footnotes">
<ol class="footnotes-list">
<li id="fn1" class="footnote-item"><p>This has <strong>bold</strong> and <em>italic</em>. <a href="#fnref1" class="footnote-backref">↩︎</a></p>
</li>
</ol>
</section>
.
